Off Calendar Feb-23-2017 Continued To Jun-27-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiffs Motion For Hearing On Petition To Approve A Minors Compromise Of A Pending Action
Off Calendar Feb-16-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Gena Eales, CSR 176.

Arlo Uriarte, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff/ Petitioner: Maria Piedad Tun Cun, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Wuesly X. Morales Tun not present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $15,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $3750.00 payable to Law Firm of Liberation Law Group, P.C.
Costs: $530.00
A net balance of $10,720.00 to be deposited into a blocked account at:
Citibank Bank, 4638 Mission Street, San Francisco, CA 94112 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account.
No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514 prior to Hearing.
